note: Curated set of real, public-domain human EEG recordings, re-named to REACT's PHI-free convention and header-scrubbed. Two source datasets: PhysioNet EEGMMIDB (64-ch motor/imagery) and PhysioNet eegmat / Zyma et al. (23-ch 10-20 mental-arithmetic). Each file references its dataset via `source`; full citations + licenses are in `sources`. Additional EEGMMIDB EDFs are staged in /seed-edfs-archive/.

eegmmidb.name: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (EEGMMIDB) v1.0.0
eegmmidb.citation: Schalk, G., McFarland, D.J., Hinterberger, T., Birbaumer, N., Wolpaw, J.R. BCI2000: A General-Purpose Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) System. IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering 51(6):1034-1043, 2004.
eegmmidb.citationResource: Goldberger, A.L., Amaral, L.A.N., Glass, L., et al. PhysioBank, PhysioToolkit, and PhysioNet: Components of a New Research Resource for Complex Physiologic Signals. Circulation 101(23):e215-e220, 2000.

eegmat.name: PhysioNet EEG During Mental Arithmetic Tasks (eegmat) v1.0.0
eegmat.citation: Zyma, I.; Tukaev, S.; Seleznov, I.; Kiyono, K.; Popov, A.; Chernykh, M.; Shpenkov, O. Electroencephalograms during Mental Arithmetic Task Performance. Data 2019, 4, 14. https://doi.org/10.3390/data4010014
eegmat.citationResource: Goldberger, A.L., Amaral, L.A.N., Glass, L., et al. PhysioBank, PhysioToolkit, and PhysioNet: Components of a New Research Resource for Complex Physiologic Signals. Circulation 101(23):e215-e220, 2000.

source: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (EEGMMIDB) v1.0.0
citation: Schalk, G., McFarland, D.J., Hinterberger, T., Birbaumer, N., Wolpaw, J.R. BCI2000: A General-Purpose Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) System. IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering 51(6):1034-1043, 2004.

files.task: Routine EEG with motor task (left/right fist)
